advantages: One tool for dependencies, environment, and packaging.
A real solver produces a consistent, conflict-checked version set.
poetry.lock makes installs deterministic with hashes.
Dependency groups cleanly separate dev/test/optional from runtime.
disadvantages: Another tool to learn and install beyond pip.
Resolution can be slow for large, conflicting trees.
Some deployment targets expect requirements.txt and need an export step.
Occasional friction with packages that have unusual build/install needs.
